svg.title: Marin proactive initiation architecture
svg.desc: Four trigger types feed into a proactive engine on the server and frontend, delivering unprompted messages to the chat UI.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the idle timeout trigger work for Marin?')
sendPrompt('How does the scheduled trigger work for Marin?')
sendPrompt('What context events can trigger Marin to speak first?')
sendPrompt('How does page load trigger a Marin greeting?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement the proactive engine on the FastAPI server?')
g.text: rate-limit check · cooldown guard · topic selector · calls marin LLM

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does SSE deliver Marin proactive messages to the frontend?')
g.text: persistent event stream · frontend listens on load

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the frontend JS for receiving Marin proactive messages')
g.text: respects isStreaming · queues if user is mid-typing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Marin proactive message look like in the chat UI?')
